title: Prompt Log Entry (Enhanced v2)
description: Enhanced prompt logging with complexity signals for human-agent retrospectives

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the prompt was submitted

prompt.description: The full text of the user's prompt

complexity_signals.description: Signals indicating prompt quality and clarity

has_constraints.description: Whether prompt includes constraint words (only, must, don't, etc.)

has_examples.description: Whether prompt includes code examples or references

has_acceptance_criteria.description: Whether prompt defines success criteria or expected outcomes

file_references.description: Count of file paths/names referenced in the prompt

ambiguity_score.description: Calculated ambiguity score (0.0 = clear, 1.0 = very ambiguous)

examples.prompt: Add JWT authentication to /api/users endpoint using the existing auth middleware in src/middleware/auth.ts
